item.title: At Hitler’s Eagle’s Nest: A Veteran’s Story
item.description: A veteran’s account of arriving at Hitler’s Eagle’s Nest during the war.

media:content.media:title: At Hitler’s Eagle’s Nest: A Veteran’s Story
media:content.media:description: A veteran’s account of arriving at Hitler’s Eagle’s Nest during the war.

item.title: American Veterans Center: A Remarkable Career
item.description: A look at an American hero, fighter pilot, and the youngest moonwalker, shared by American Veterans Center.

media:content.media:title: American Veterans Center: A Remarkable Career
media:content.media:description: A look at an American hero, fighter pilot, and the youngest moonwalker, shared by American Veterans Center.

item.title: Inside the War Against the Taliban
item.description: A veteran perspective on the conflict against the Taliban.

media:content.media:title: Inside the War Against the Taliban
media:content.media:description: A veteran perspective on the conflict against the Taliban.

item.title: Lee Harvey Oswald: Firsthand Account
item.description: A firsthand account involving Lee Harvey Oswald, offering personal perspective and historical context surrounding his actions and events connected to his life.

media:content.media:title: Lee Harvey Oswald: Firsthand Account
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account involving Lee Harvey Oswald, offering personal perspective and historical context surrounding his actions and events connected to his life.

item.title: Hunting Nazi Officers After WWII
item.description: A historical look at efforts after the Second World War to locate and arrest fleeing Nazi officials, focusing on war crimes investigations and postwar justice operations.

media:content.media:title: Hunting Nazi Officers After WWII
media:content.media:description: A historical look at efforts after the Second World War to locate and arrest fleeing Nazi officials, focusing on war crimes investigations and postwar justice operations.

item.title: Behind Enemy Lines Story
item.description: A firsthand military account of operating behind enemy lines, highlighting strategy, survival, and experiences from wartime missions shared by veterans.

media:content.media:title: Behind Enemy Lines Story
media:content.media:description: A firsthand military account of operating behind enemy lines, highlighting strategy, survival, and experiences from wartime missions shared by veterans.

item.title: The Recon Scout Who Led the Way
item.description: A veteran recon scout’s story highlighting leadership in the field, forward scouting missions, and critical decisions made under pressure during combat operations.

media:content.media:title: The Recon Scout Who Led the Way
media:content.media:description: A veteran recon scout’s story highlighting leadership in the field, forward scouting missions, and critical decisions made under pressure during combat operations.

item.title: Labeled an Enemy Alien: A Veteran’s Story
item.description: A veteran recounts being wrongly classified as an enemy alien, exploring the personal impact, wartime tensions, and the path to resolution and recognition.

media:content.media:title: Labeled an Enemy Alien: A Veteran’s Story
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts being wrongly classified as an enemy alien, exploring the personal impact, wartime tensions, and the path to resolution and recognition.

item.title: Medal of Honor: A Story of Courage
item.description: A powerful Medal of Honor account highlighting extraordinary bravery in combat, sacrifice, and the actions that led to the nation’s highest military award.

media:content.media:title: Medal of Honor: A Story of Courage
media:content.media:description: A powerful Medal of Honor account highlighting extraordinary bravery in combat, sacrifice, and the actions that led to the nation’s highest military award.
